message:
feat(ftui-pty): add IRM (Insert/Replace Mode) + DECAWM toggle (bd-3vgiz)

VirtualTerminal:
- Add insert_mode field + ANSI mode 4 handler (CSI 4 h/l)
- Add autowrap field + DEC mode 7 handler (CSI ?7 h/l)
- IRM: printed chars shift existing text right when enabled
- DECAWM: cursor clamps at right margin when disabled (no wrap)
- Both reset by DECSTR (soft reset) and RIS (full reset)
- 7 new VT unit tests (177 total)

Differential harness:
- Add IRM support to core harness apply_print() (insert_chars before write)
- Add DECAWM support to core harness (skip wrap when autowrap off)
- 7 new differential fixtures (98 total): IRM insert/replace/edge,
  DECAWM off/on/edge

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
